title: nRF52 BLE multisensor benchmark fixture
representative_intent: nRF52840 BLE Li-ion multisensor with charger and LDO

requirements.text: Represent nRF52 BLE radio board constraints with antenna keepout and RF non-claims visible.
Provide single-cell Li-ion charger and fuel-gauge evidence for a battery-powered multisensor node.
Connect representative environmental/motion sensors with I2C/SPI bus and logic-rail evidence.
Attach proof-pack, KiCad, manufacturing export, RF/SI/PI, current-budget, and benchmark coverage evidence.

non_claims: This benchmark fixture is repository coverage evidence, not BLE RF certification or fabrication approval.
The fixture does not claim antenna performance, regulatory compliance, battery safety, manufacturability, or production readiness.
